reasoning: Approve refund as an exception. Although the order shows as shipped and is outside the standard 30-day policy, internal notes confirm this is a VIP customer with high lifetime value, minimal refund history, and that the customer contacted support earlier but our delayed response caused the policy lapse. No delivery confirmation is visible. Approving aligns with documented recommendation and customer retention goals.
